category_sources: Official homepage https://bup.github.io/ describes bup as an efficient backup system using git packfile format, incremental saves, and deduplication.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading at https://bup.github.io/ is bup.
docs_sources: Official homepage https://bup.github.io/ has a Documentation section linking to overview and man pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/bup/bup, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://bup.github.io/ and README describe backup, git packfile storage, incremental saves, global deduplication, and Python implementation.
